race.comment: MONGOLIAN CITY (8) progressive type who opened this prep with a decisive win, scoring by 3.5 lengths over 1212m at Kilmore. Looks to be in for a big campaign and can measure up with natural improvement. NAUGHTY SORT (12) presents third up and has claims off two good runs this campaign. Has form on the going and is worth consideration here. GALLANT PRINCE (2) consistent gelding but hasn't won for a while. Put the writing on the wall last time over 1300m at Warrnambool when second and beaten 2 lengths. Gets chance. BLUE BANDIT (3) has collected a few midfield finishes of late including last time out when sixth over 1300m at Warrnambool. Include.
